data.name: 異世界魔物娘後宮
data.detailed_description:
◆故事


身為養成遊戲愛好者的我，某天在睡眠中聽見了呼喚，一覺醒來發現熟悉的房間變成了寬敞的大理石神殿，面前的銀髮女孩用輕蔑的眼神看著我。

「我是這世界的女神『蘇菲莉亞』，為了拯救世界而召喚來勇者。」

雖然自稱女神，卻不怎麼聰明的樣子。我在誤打誤撞下獲得了最強的＂神之力＂，腦裡萌生了惡作劇的念頭——



掌握最強能力的我，陸續遭遇精靈女王芙蕾絲、史萊姆莫可，用愛的力量幫助她們的同時也進一步了解異世界，發現這裡似乎充滿了爭端與無序......這一切究竟是怎麼造成的？＂其他的勇者＂又是怎麼回事？一切的一切，似乎都指向了某人留下的爛攤子。

那麼，作為處理爛攤子的報答，就用色色的事來支付吧？

◆遊戲特色


◇15張基本CG，包含差分150張以上
◇遊戲文字5萬字
◇三位主要女角

◆故事

那麼，作為處理爛攤子的報答，就用色色的事來支付吧？

◇15張基本CG，包含差分150張以上
◇遊戲文字5萬字
◇三位主要女角
data.short_description: 我沉浸於魔物娘遊戲的某天，一覺醒來居然成為了被召喚的＂勇者＂！？不可靠的笨蛋女神、傲慢的精靈女王，及溫柔乖巧的人型史萊姆，各個都需要我的幫助，在拯救世界的空檔......收集後宮也不是什麼難事吧？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 日文, 泰文, 簡體中文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 越南文, 韓文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 512 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Harem of Monster Girls
data.detailed_description:
◆Story


As a fan of simulation games, I heard a call in my sleep one day and woke up to find my familiar room transformed into a spacious marble temple, with a silver-haired girl looking at me with contempt.

"I am the goddess of this world, 'Sophilia,' and I have summoned a Brave to save it."

Although she called herself a goddess, she didn't look very clever. I was given the most powerful "God's Power" by mistake, and an idea of mischief was born in my mind--



With the strongest power, I encountered Fraise the Elf queen and Moko the Slime. While using my power of love to help them, I learnt more about the Otherworld – this place that seemed full of strife and disorder...What was the cause? And what about the "other" Braves? Everything seemed to point to a mess left behind by someone.

So, in return for dealing with their mess, how about they pay for it with sex?

◆Game features


◇15 basic CGs
◇Game text: 50,000
◇Three main female characters

data.short_description: One day, when I was immersed in a monster-girl game, I woke up as a summoned "Brave!" The unreliable and silly goddess, arrogant Elf queen, and gentle humanoid Slime all needed my help saving the world... It wouldn’t be hard to build a harem, would it?
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Japanese, Thai, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Korean
